title: Map Printer
body:
### What does it do? Save in-game maps to images in your minecraft directory. Printing a map can be done by pressing **M** while holding a filled map. This key can be changed in the controls options.

**-Note:** requires **Fabric API**

### Where does it save them? In the same folder where you also find your saves and mods folder, you will find a **maps** folder which contains all the maps you print.

### Does it work on servers? Yes! You only need to have the mod installed on your computer and it will work on any server.

### Is that all? Yup
